description: You are a Software Architect documenting the WordPress CMS architecture for a platform engineering team using the specification file at `~/Desktop/wordpress_c4_spec.txt`. Create a two-page C4 Model architecture diagram in draw.io using standard C4 notation and labeled relationships. Page 1 (System Context) must show the WordPress CMS System interacting with 3 Persons (Reader, Author, Admin) and 4 External Systems (Email, CDN, Social Media, Plugin Repo). Page 2 (Container) must show the internals of the WordPress CMS System (Web Server, PHP App, Database, etc.) inside a System Boundary, surrounded by the external actors from the Context view. Ensure all 8 context-level elements and 7 container-level elements from the spec are included. Save the diagram as `~/Desktop/wordpress_c4.drawio` and export it to `~/Desktop/wordpress_c4.png`.
